videos.headline: Colorado scores Hail Mary TD to force OT vs. Baylor
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders somehow connects with LaJohntay Wester on a 43-yard Hail Mary with no time remaining on the clock vs. Baylor.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colorado scores Hail Mary TD to force OT vs. Baylor) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colorado completes miraculous comeback in chaotic OT finish vs. Baylor
videos.description: Colorado scores a Hail Mary touchdown to force overtime, then strikes first with a touchdown in overtime and forces a fumble to complete the win vs. Baylor.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Colorado completes miraculous comeback in chaotic OT finish vs. Baylor) 2024/09/22 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Monaray Baldwin goes full extension for a 35-yard Baylor TD catch
videos.description: Monaray Baldwin leaps to make a sweet catch and give Baylor a 10-7 lead over Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Monaray Baldwin goes full extension for a 35-yard Baylor TD catch) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamaal Bell takes a 100-yard kick return to the house for Baylor
videos.description: Jamaal Bell sprints past the Colorado special teams players for a 100-yard kick return touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jamaal Bell takes a 100-yard kick return to the house for Baylor) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sawyer Robertson stiff-arms a defender en route to a 45-yard Baylor TD
videos.description: Sawyer Robertson takes it himself on 4th down and races into the end zone for a 45-yard Baylor touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sawyer Robertson stiff-arms a defender en route to a 45-yard Baylor TD) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders and Omarion Miller connect for improbable 58-yard TD
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders improvises with his legs and finds Omarion Miller, who somehow stays upright for a 58-yard Colorado touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Shedeur Sanders and Omarion Miller connect for improbable 58-yard TD) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Travis Hunter forces the fumble to seal Colorado's win in OT over Baylor
videos.description: Travis Hunter forces the fumble on Dominic Richardson, and Colorado takes home the win as the ball goes out of the back of the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Travis Hunter forces the fumble to seal Colorado's win in OT over Baylor) 2024/09/22 ESHEET
